title: Discrete Uniform Distribution
description: When all outcomes are equally likely.

lessons.title: Equally Likely Outcomes
lessons.content:
## Equally Likely Outcomes

Each of n outcomes has probability 1/n.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Uniform PMF
lessons.content:
## Uniform PMF

P(X=x) = 1/n for x = 1, 2, ..., n.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Real-World Examples
lessons.content:
## Real-World Examples

Fair die, random number generation, random selection.

lessons.title: Mean and Variance
lessons.content:
## Mean and Variance

μ = (n+1)/2, σ² = (n²-1)/12.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.
